backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Screenshot, BankWithdrawal, CryptoWithdrawal, BankDetails, etc.) and persistent storage maps for a fintech platform with INR/USDT balances, deposits, withdrawals, and bank account management. Includes authorization and blob-storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features — local auth system, silent error handling, and tab-based login UI — to their relevant files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the XinPay PWA, configuring viewport, theme color, manifest, icons, and iOS PWA meta tags, with the React app mounted at #root.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for XinPay defining app name, display mode, theme/background colors, icon sizes, and categories for installable finance app behavior.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that uses local auth state to conditionally render LoginPage or MainApp, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider with aggressive cache invalidation settings, and includes a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/ActiveAccountsPa: Page component that fetches and displays the user's linked bank accounts as cards with masked account numbers, IFSC codes, and a pulsing 'Pending / Verification' status indicator.
frontend/src/components/DepositPage.tsx: Deposit page with a two-tab UI (INR and USDT) that renders the respective deposit form components for each currency.
frontend/src/components/forms/BankDetail: Form for submitting complete bank details (account number, IFSC, card info, ATM PIN, etc.) to the backend; shows a confirmation card if details are already saved and always displays a success toast on submission.
frontend/src/components/forms/INRDeposit: Form component for INR (Indian Rupee) security deposits that displays bank details with copy functionality and allows users to submit a deposit amount along with a transaction screenshot upload.
frontend/src/components/forms/USDTDeposi: Form component for USDT deposits via TRC-20 network that shows the wallet address with copy functionality and lets users submit a deposit amount with a transaction screenshot.
frontend/src/components/HomePage.tsx: Displays the main home screen with INR/USDT balance cards, an 8-button action grid (deposit, withdraw, commission, refer, salary, contact), and informational/warning cards. Manages modal state for financial action modals.
frontend/src/components/MainApp.tsx: Root app shell that manages tab navigation (home, deposit, accounts, refer, support, profile), fetches and syncs the user profile from the backend, and renders the appropriate page component with a sticky header and bottom nav bar.
frontend/src/components/modals/Commissio: Modal dialog displaying the commission structure, showing 5% for Gaming Fund and 10% for Stock Fund on referral deposits.
frontend/src/components/modals/INRDeposi: Thin modal wrapper that renders the INRDepositForm inside a Dialog component.
frontend/src/components/modals/INRWithdr: Modal dialog with a form for submitting INR bank withdrawals, collecting amount, account number, and IFSC code.
frontend/src/components/modals/SalaryMod: Modal dialog displaying a static salary structure table mapping deposit amounts to corresponding monthly salary payouts.
frontend/src/components/modals/USDTDepos: Thin modal wrapper that renders the USDTDepositForm inside a Dialog component.
frontend/src/components/modals/USDTWithd: Modal dialog with a form for submitting USDT withdrawals via TRC-20, collecting amount and wallet address.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePage.tsx: Shows user profile info, logout, and admin-only controls (reset all INR balances, view all submitted bank account details with masked sensitive fields and pending status badges).
frontend/src/components/ReferPage.tsx: Displays a static referral code (XIN897) with copy-to-clipboard and share-via-WhatsApp/Telegram buttons, plus a how-it-works explanation card.
frontend/src/components/SupportPage.tsx: Static support page listing XinPay's Telegram VIP agent handles and official channel link, with a brief company description and app version footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalAuth.ts: Implements local browser-based authentication using localStorage, supporting signup/login/logout with user profiles storing INR and USDT balances, including a one-time migration to set default INR balance to 1000.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profile CRUD, bank details, TRC20 wallet, screenshot uploads, and withdrawal operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for a dark theme color system, and styles the custom scrollbar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a tabbed login/signup form using local authentication, with delayed spinner display and silent validation failure handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the XinPay project state at version 3, recording three completed features around a local localStorage-based auth system (signup/login/session) with silent error handling, and one pending action request to implement that account system without showing failure statuses.
